mapper.select: SELECT ATT_SEQ ,NTCART_SEQ ,IMG_NM ,IMG_DESC ,SORT_ODRG ,USE_YN ,PSTNG_START_DATE ,PSTNG_END_DATE ,CRET_IP ,CRET_DT ,CRET_ID ,AMD_IP ,AMD_DT ,AMD_ID FROM NMCP_SNS_BOARD_ATT_DTL WHERE NTCART_SEQ = #{ntcartSeq} ORDER BY SORT_ODRG

SELECT NTCART_SEQ ,SNS_CTG_CD ,YY ,MM ,SNS_CNTPNT_CD ,NTCART_TITLE ,THUMB_IMG_NM ,THUMB_IMG_DESC ,PC_LIST_IMG_NM ,PC_LIST_IMG_DESC ,MOBILE_LIST_IMG_NM ,MOBILE_LIST_IMG_DESC ,PC_LINK_URL ,MOBILE_LINK_URL ,NTCART_DATE ,HIT_CNT ,SORT_ODRG ,USE_YN ,PSTNG_START_DATE ,PSTNG_END_DATE ,CRET_IP ,CRET_DT ,CRET_ID ,AMD_IP ,AMD_DT ,AMD_ID FROM NMCP_SNS_BOARD_BAS WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' AND SNS_CTG_CD = 'SNS001' AND YY = #{value} AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHHMMSS') BETWEEN PSTNG_START_DATE AND PSTNG_END_DATE ORDER BY MM
SELECT DISTINCT YY FROM NMCP_SNS_BOARD_BAS WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' AND SNS_CTG_CD = 'SNS001' AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHHMMSS') BETWEEN PSTNG_START_DATE AND PSTNG_END_DATE ORDER BY YY DESC

SELECT NTCART_SEQ ,SNS_CTG_CD ,YY ,MM ,SNS_CNTPNT_CD ,NTCART_TITLE ,THUMB_IMG_NM ,THUMB_IMG_DESC ,PC_LIST_IMG_NM ,PC_LIST_IMG_DESC ,MOBILE_LIST_IMG_NM ,MOBILE_LIST_IMG_DESC ,PC_LINK_URL ,MOBILE_LINK_URL ,NTCART_DATE ,HIT_CNT ,SORT_ODRG ,USE_YN ,PSTNG_START_DATE ,PSTNG_END_DATE ,CRET_IP ,CRET_DT ,CRET_ID ,AMD_IP ,AMD_DT ,AMD_ID FROM NMCP_SNS_BOARD_BAS WHERE NTCART_SEQ = #{ntcartSeq} AND USE_YN = 'Y' AND SNS_CTG_CD = 'SNS001' AND YY = #{yy} AND PSTNG_END_DATE > TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHHMMSS')

SELECT ATT_SEQ ,NTCART_SEQ ,IMG_NM ,IMG_DESC ,SORT_ODRG ,USE_YN ,PSTNG_START_DATE ,PSTNG_END_DATE ,CRET_IP ,CRET_DT ,CRET_ID ,AMD_IP ,AMD_DT ,AMD_ID FROM NMCP_SNS_BOARD_ATT_DTL WHERE NTCART_SEQ = #{ntcartSeq}

SELECT NTCART_SEQ ,MM ,THUMB_IMG_NM ,THUMB_IMG_DESC ,PC_LIST_IMG_NM ,PC_LIST_IMG_DESC ,MOBILE_LIST_IMG_NM ,MOBILE_LIST_IMG_DESC ,PC_LINK_URL ,MOBILE_LINK_URL ,NTCART_DATE ,HIT_CNT ,USE_YN ,PSTNG_START_DATE ,PSTNG_END_DATE FROM NMCP_SNS_BOARD_BAS WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' AND SNS_CTG_CD = 'SNS001' AND YY = #{yy} AND PSTNG_END_DATE > TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHHMMSS') ORDER BY MM
mapper.update: UPDATE NMCP_SNS_BOARD_BAS SET HIT_CNT = HIT_CNT + 1 WHERE NTCART_SEQ = #{ntcartSeq}
